uplink.description: data packet (fPort 2): positive temperature, humidity, pressure, battery
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; raw fields temp=2155 hum=4820 pressure=10132 batt-byte=230. expected.data authored from running reference/upstream-codec.js (Temperature 21.55 C, Humidity 48.2 %, AirPressure 1013.2 hPa, BatteryLevel 3.3 V) and re-expressing in vocabulary keys.

uplink.description: data packet (fPort 1): negative temperature (two's complement), high humidity
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; raw temp=64993 (signed -543) hum=9500 pressure=9980 batt-byte=45. expected.data authored from running reference/upstream-codec.js (Temperature -5.43 C, Humidity 95 %, AirPressure 998 hPa, BatteryLevel 1.45 V).

uplink.description: config packet (fPort 3): device identification / settings frame -> camelCase extras
uplink._note: Synthetic config frame; expected.data authored from running reference/upstream-codec.js config branch (HW 30/10=3.0, FW 21/10=2.1). The config frame carries no vocabulary measurement; all fields are camelCase extras.

uplink.description: error: data packet too short on fPort 2
uplink._note: Synthetic truncated frame. Upstream silently produces NaN/undefined on short input; our codec guards the fixed-length data frame and reports an error.
